notes: Runs just as well as the Windows version (which had controller problems).  You need to disable the controller (check out the readme) and then get a program like antimicro (it's in the AUR) to map the keyboard and mouse to a gamepad.
title: Offspring Fling!

notes: Seems to work perfectly with xbox one controller
title: Offspring Fling!

notes: I can't assign my Dualshock 4 d-pad and sticks in the game settings. Steam controller configuration is ignored. If I disable gamepad support in the game's config file and configure a gamepad as keyboard via Steam it just do not work.
